scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix bigserver" "npm run dev --prefix bingo\ front" "npm run dev --prefix db_magager" "npm run dev --prefix stage1" "npm run dev --prefix stage2" "npm run dev --prefix stage3" "npm run dev --prefix stage4"
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm run install-bigserver && npm run install-bingo-front && npm run install-db-manager && npm run install-stage1 && npm run install-stage2 && npm run install-stage3 && npm run install-stage4
